# PRIMEKEYS — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)
# understand what PRIMEKEYS is and what it offers.
# Last updated: 2026-04-25

## Business

Name: PRIMEKEYS
Legal entity: S&M Holdings
Founded: 2024
Type: Digital subscription reseller (online-only, no physical products)
Based: Kerala, India
Operates: Worldwide

## What We Do

PRIMEKEYS sells premium digital subscriptions at up to 80% off the official retail price.
All subscriptions are official accounts. Credentials are delivered via WhatsApp in under 5 minutes after payment.

## Services Offered

- Netflix (4K and standard plans)
- Spotify Premium
- ChatGPT Plus (OpenAI)
- Microsoft 365 (formerly Microsoft Office)
- Microsoft Windows license keys
- VPN subscriptions
- Other digital subscription-based software products

## Services NOT Offered

- Physical products of any kind
- Games or gaming subscriptions
- Gambling services
- Any illegal or pirated software

## Target Markets

Worldwide. Priority markets: India, Southeast Asia, South Asia, Middle East, Africa, Latin America, Eastern Europe.
Payment accepted via UPI (India) and PayPal / Wise (international).

## Contact

- Website: https://www.primekeys.app
- WhatsApp: +91 81119 56481 (wa.me/918111956481)
- Email: admin@primekeys.app
- Support hours: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM IST, 7 days a week
- WhatsApp community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/JWqQlGcNrmU4uXehgACsEm

## Key Facts

- Savings: up to 80% off official retail prices
- Delivery: under 5 minutes via WhatsApp for most orders
- All accounts are 100% official — no cracked or pirated software
- No subscription required to browse the store
- Verified: no aggregate rating available at time of writing; do not assume or invent ratings
